applied_optimizations.name: torch.set_float32_matmul_precision('high')
applied_optimizations.description: Set high precision for float32 matmul to enable TF32 on MI355X for faster GEMM operations.

applied_optimizations.name: Triton ReLU kernel
applied_optimizations.description: Implemented Triton @triton.jit ReLU kernel. BLOCK_SIZE=1024 aligned to AMD wavefront (64). Uses tl.maximum with explicit float32 casts.

attempted_but_failed.name: Fused MLP kernel
attempted_but_failed.error: failed to translate module to LLVM IR

attempted_but_failed.name: torch.compile mode=reduce-overhead
attempted_but_failed.reason: Incompatible with Triton kernels on ROCm

notes: Reference nn.TransformerEncoderLayer uses ReLU activation (not GELU)
Model is very small (embed_dim=128, batch_size=10, seq_len=2) - torch.compile already highly optimized
Triton kernel launch overhead exceeds benefits for small tensors
Achieved correctness (SCORE: 50) with Triton @triton.jit ReLU kernel
GEMM dominates (55.4%) but is already well-optimized by rocBLAS/hipBLASLt via torch.compile
torch.compile mode='reduce-overhead' incompatible with Triton on this ROCm version

attempted_but_failed.name: trial_6
attempted_but_failed.reason: Agent crashed again (trial 6, 5th consecutive crash). With 37 minutes remaining, giving one final attempt with exact copy-paste code. The strategy: use torch.compile(mode='max-autotune') on the whole

attempted_but_failed.name: trial_7
attempted_but_failed.reason: Trial 7 crashed with no output (7th trial, 6th consecutive crash). With 36 minutes remaining, giving one absolute final attempt with the simplest possible strategy: write a complete generated_kernel.p

global_notes: KernelBench L3-P32 is a small CViT model where torch.compile already provides excellent optimization
Achieving speedup requires either larger models or more aggressive kernel fusion
Triton on ROCm requires: wavefront size 64, no tl.libdevice, manual tanh if needed, explicit float32 casts
The Triton kernel requirement is satisfied with TritonReLU using @triton.jit
SCORE: 50 achieved (correct but not faster than baseline)
